questions.question: Explain the difference between Datagram Protocol (UDP) and Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) in terms of error control, and provide an example of when each would be used.
Describe the flow control mechanism used in TCP and explain how it prevents a sender from overwhelming the receiver with excessive data.
A TCP connection is established between two hosts A and B. Host A sends 1000 bytes of data to host B and then sends a SYN packet to initiate a connection. What happens next and why?
